label: README.md
beginnerDescription: A short README so anyone landing on the repo knows what it is and how to run it.
advancedDescription: Quickstart template extracted from ArchonVII/.github/STARTER.md.

label: LICENSE
beginnerDescription: A license tells other people what they can do with your code.
advancedDescription: Body fetched from api.github.com/licenses/{spdx}; no auth required.

label: .gitignore
beginnerDescription: Tells git which files to never commit (build output, secrets, etc.).
advancedDescription: Body fetched from api.github.com/gitignore/templates/{language}; 'Both' concatenates.

label: AGENTS.md
beginnerDescription: The cross-tool contract for AI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini) working in this repo.
advancedDescription: Copied from snapshots of ArchonVII/repo-template/AGENTS.md, the frozen docs/repo-update-log.md archive, the docs/agent-process/document-policy.md charter (document-policy spec §5.1, lane 1c), and the docs/agent-process/message-protocol.md charter that AGENTS.md's `## Message protocol` section links to (#278).

label: Documentation system floor
beginnerDescription: Installs the documentation map, canonical register, index, and doc-system contract as one coherent floor.
advancedDescription: Copies the four doc-map required.base files from the pinned repo-template snapshot. foundation.agents requires this feature so generated startup baselines never demand an uninstallable documentation floor.

label: CLAUDE.md
beginnerDescription: A short file that tells Claude to read AGENTS.md first.
advancedDescription: 5-line stub. Claude-specific addenda land below the pointer.

label: GEMINI.md
beginnerDescription: Same as CLAUDE.md but for Gemini.
advancedDescription: 5-line stub pointing at AGENTS.md.

label: .agent/coordination/ contract
beginnerDescription: A short contract telling agents this repo coordinates only itself — no shared boards, no assumptions about other repos.
advancedDescription: Copied from snapshots of ArchonVII/repo-template/.agent/coordination/README.md. Locked neutral contract; the active board (.agent/coordination/board.md) is the separate opt-in coordination-board feature. Ordered before git-init so the contract lands in the initial commit.

label: .githooks/
beginnerDescription: Installs the standard local git hooks for commit-message and protected-branch guardrails.
advancedDescription: Copied from repo-template snapshots with repo-template-internal references scrubbed. Includes the F19 checkout-role worktree guard (feature commits blocked in the primary checkout). core.hooksPath is activated by git-init when safe.

label: Friction ledger
beginnerDescription: Adds a structured .claude/friction.md ledger for non-bug workflow hiccups.
advancedDescription: Seeds the repo-template friction ledger, ensures the .gitignore exception, and relies on the required AGENTS.md and owner-maintenance hook baselines for the instruction line and append-log allowlist.

label: .gitattributes
beginnerDescription: Keeps shell hooks and scripts on LF endings.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline.

label: CHANGELOG.md (release-class)
beginnerDescription: Adds the release-class changelog folded from Conventional Commit history at release time.
advancedDescription: Release-class CHANGELOG baseline copied from repo-template; per-PR fragments are retired.

label: actionlint workflow
beginnerDescription: Adds workflow syntax checking for any repo that has GitHub Actions files.
advancedDescription: Thin caller to ArchonVII/github-workflows/.github/workflows/actionlint.yml@v1. No language or stack assumption.

label: CODEOWNERS
beginnerDescription: Adds a top-level CODEOWNERS file when the GitHub owner is known.
advancedDescription: Writes '* @<owner>'. If no owner is known, records an intentional skip instead of writing junk ownership.

label: Dependabot
beginnerDescription: Adds weekly GitHub Actions dependency updates.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline. Inert until the repo is pushed.

label: Pull request template
beginnerDescription: Adds the standard ArchonVII PR body structure and verification checklist.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline.

label: git init + initial commit on main
beginnerDescription: Sets up version control and saves the first snapshot of the repo.
advancedDescription: `git init -b main`, stages tracked files only, single initial commit.

label: Create GitHub repo
beginnerDescription: Creates the repo on github.com and pushes your initial commit.
advancedDescription: Uses `gh repo create OWNER/REPO --source=. --remote=origin --push`.

label: Apply standard labels
beginnerDescription: Adds ~30 standard labels (type / severity / priority / effort / status / workflow).
advancedDescription: Invokes ArchonVII/github-workflows/scripts/setup-repo.mjs --solo for label application.

label: Apply baseline branch protection
beginnerDescription: Protects main: require PRs, no force-push, conversations must resolve. Named required checks come later.
advancedDescription: Baseline only. Named required status checks are deferred (GitHub requires a check to have run within 7 days before it can be required). A postCheck is recorded in the manifest.

label: .agent/check-map.yml
beginnerDescription: Records which local paths require which checks so agents and the required gate share one policy map.
advancedDescription: Copied from the repo-template baseline. The single required gate remains the branch-protection contract; this file documents and customizes the path-to-check matrix.

label: Active coordination (board + live claims)
beginnerDescription: Turns on ACTIVE multi-agent coordination for repos where several agents or people work concurrently: a board.md you edit by hand plus a live claims/ folder agents write to. Selecting this enables live claims — agent:status will report coordination installed and doc-sweep can see active lanes instead of guessing about stale worktrees. Skip it (the default) if only one agent works here at a time.
advancedDescription: Installs both halves of active coordination: the board.md human surface (from the repo-template snapshot) and an empty .agent/coordination/claims/ directory (kept by a .gitkeep placeholder) where agents drop one <lane>.json claim per active lane. Opt-in companion to the locked foundation.coordination contract — leaving it unselected keeps the repo claims-absent so agent:status reports 'not installed' and doc-sweep keeps its leave/log behavior for worktree docs. Names no other repo or machine-global board; live claims stay isolated to this repo.

label: Anomaly triage
beginnerDescription: While an agent is writing code, it can flag side bugs it notices into a per-PR file. This workflow turns them into PR comments or new issues automatically.
advancedDescription: Caller to ArchonVII/github-workflows/anomaly-triage.yml@v1. Pairs with the AGENTS.md contract section documenting `.archon/anomalies-thispr.md` (shipped by repo-template). Idempotent across PR re-syncs via fingerprint markers.

label: Repo update log guard (retired)
beginnerDescription: Retired compatibility identifier for repositories whose existing setup manifest selected the former guard.
advancedDescription: Disabled no-op retained so old manifests remain resolvable after repo-template retired the per-PR repo-update-log fragment regime.

label: pr-policy.yml
beginnerDescription: Blocks a PR until its body has a `## Verification` section, at least one checked checkbox, and links an issue.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/pr-policy.yml@v1.

label: semantic-pr-title.yml
beginnerDescription: Blocks PRs whose titles don't follow the `type(scope): description` convention.
advancedDescription: Caller wraps amannn/action-semantic-pull-request@v5 via the @v1 reusable workflow.

label: pr-body-autoinject.yml
beginnerDescription: If a bot (like Copilot) opens a PR with an empty body, this injects the verification template.
advancedDescription: Runs on `opened` only. Idempotent — won't overwrite an existing stub.

label: branch-naming.yml
beginnerDescription: Blocks branch names that don't match the agreed convention (e.g. `agent/claude/12-foo`).
advancedDescription: Default regex covers the conventions documented in repo-template/AGENTS.md.

label: Repo Required Gate
beginnerDescription: Installs one always-reporting required branch-protection gate. Configure branch protection to require `repo-required-gate / decision`.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/repo-required-gate.yml@v1. It detects changed paths, runs only relevant checks, and exposes a stable decision job for branch protection.

label: Node CI (ci.yml)
beginnerDescription: Runs lint, typecheck, and tests on every PR. Pick this if your repo has a package.json.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/node-ci.yml@v1. Detects npm/pnpm/yarn from the lockfile. Job is named `ci-success` so branch protection can require a single check across all `workflow.*-ci` choices.

label: Python CI (ci.yml)
beginnerDescription: Runs ruff lint, ruff format-check, pyright, and pytest on every PR. Pick this if your repo has a pyproject.toml or requirements.txt.
advancedDescription: Caller to github-workflows/.github/workflows/python-ci.yml@v1. Uses uv when pyproject.toml is present; falls back to pip. Job is named `ci-success` so branch protection can require a single check across all `workflow.*-ci` choices.

label: Minimal CI (no build/test)
beginnerDescription: A no-op check that always passes. Pick this for docs-only or snapshot repos that have no build or test.
advancedDescription: Installs a `ci-success` no-op job so branch protection has a stable required check name regardless of repo type. Pairs with `actionlint.yml` (issue #16 / F3) for workflow-syntax coverage even when there is no language CI.

label: Enable Copilot for repo
beginnerDescription: Enables GitHub Copilot for this repo (v0.4 — requires an org with Copilot billing).
advancedDescription: Manual-only activation for now: uses gh api users/<owner> only to classify org vs personal, then blocks personal accounts and records a manual billing/policy checklist into the manifest for organizations. It does not mutate Copilot settings until the API/billing/seat semantics are proven. Staged disabled until v0.4.

label: Set repo Actions secret
beginnerDescription: Sets a repository Actions secret. The value is piped to `gh secret set` via stdin — it never touches disk, argv, or logs.
advancedDescription: Uses the commandRunner stdin seam (`gh secret set NAME --repo OWNER/REPO` with --body omitted, because current gh reads stdin only when --body is not specified). The value is supplied through a runtime-only secret provider at execute time, never through serialized plan options, and the manifest records only the name + wasSet. Staged disabled until v0.4.

label: Agent lifecycle scripts
beginnerDescription: Installs the agent worktree-lifecycle and close-guard scripts, then wires their npm script entries.
advancedDescription: Copies scripts/agent/{lib,start-task,status,prune,pr-body}.mjs, scripts/pr-contract.mjs (the dependency the close scripts import), scripts/close/{lib,scan-complete,ci-guard}.mjs, and the strict closeout wrappers scripts/agent-{close-preflight,pr-ready}.mjs from the repo-template snapshot, then idempotently MERGES the managed agent:* and close:* entries into package.json (a minimal one is created if absent; all other keys are preserved). package.json is merged, not created — auditPlan reports it via the `entries` comparison. The task also appends the ephemeral close-scan ignore rule to .gitignore, so it `requires` foundation.gitignore (the foundation that owns that file) to keep the file declared in the plan — same pattern as foundation.friction-ledger (#304).

label: Doc Sweep-Up
beginnerDescription: Installs the doc-sweep runner so agents recover and preserve docs across sessions (sweep-on-open / flush-on-close) instead of stranding them when a session dies.
advancedDescription: Copies scripts/doc-sweep/{lib,git,sweep}.mjs and docs/agent-process/doc-sweep.md from the repo-template snapshot, content-aware (drift-repairing, shares the agent-lifecycle checkAllMatch/verifyAllMatch helpers). The `## Doc Sweep-Up` AGENTS.md contract ships via the repo-template AGENTS.md snapshot; the github-workflows `doc-orphan-detector.yml@v1` cron backstop is a separate opt-in. Full spec: docs/agent-process/doc-sweep.md.

label: Doc Health
beginnerDescription: Installs the report-only doc-health runner so agents can find document drift (stale charters, dangling links, missing index entries) and turn it into the normal issue -> branch -> PR lane instead of silent rot.
advancedDescription: Copies scripts/doc-health/{lib,health}.mjs and docs/agent-process/doc-health.md from the repo-template snapshot, content-aware (drift-repairing) and mirroring agent-workflow.doc-sweep. These files are named by the 2026-06-15-document-policy startup baseline; without this feature a fresh onboard reported startup readiness 'incomplete'. The deterministic report-only companion to the document policy — it never fixes, it reports. Full spec: docs/agent-process/doc-health.md.

label: Template Library
beginnerDescription: Installs the standard reusable agent, prompt, report, operations, GitHub, and partial templates from the repo-template baseline.
advancedDescription: Copies the repo-template snapshot's templates/** library into generated repos and repairs drift with exact snapshot comparison. This makes the reusable template artifact library part of the default local/headless baseline instead of a future-only UI concept.

label: Doc orphan detector (cron)
beginnerDescription: Optional weekly backstop: scans branches with no open PR and opens a tracking issue for committed docs that look stranded, so nothing slips through between sessions.
advancedDescription: Caller to ArchonVII/github-workflows/doc-orphan-detector.yml@v1 (doc-sweep §4.7). Detection only — opens/updates a per-branch tracking issue listing orphaned allow-list doc paths older than the staleness threshold; never commits or reads file contents. Pairs with the locked agent-workflow.doc-sweep runner that recovers them.
